signals.headline: [Context] Will Dogecoin reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026?
signals.raw:
**No definitive prediction confirms Dogecoin (DOGE) will reach $0.16 by December 31, 2026; current prices hover around $0.09–$0.093, with forecasts varying widely from bearish lows near $0.09 to bullish highs up to $0.25, and market sentiment remains bearish.**[1][2][3][4][5]

### Current Status (as of April 10, 2026)
Dogecoin trades at approximately **$0.0928–$0.093**, down from late 2025 levels near $0.12, amid extreme fear (Fear & Greed Index: 16) and bearish technicals (21/28 indicators bear
